treatment_information.dosage_or_details: 2-mm 0-fetoscope carrying a 400-μm Nd:YAG laser fiber, power of 25 W
treatment_information.treatment_response: Immediate in utero recoloration of the left foot observed following the band section. No intraoperative maternal or fetal complications noted.

treatment_information.specific_treatment: release of the left Achilles tendon and the right toes
treatment_information.treatment_response: Infant was able to walk with normal lower extremity function at the age of 18 months.

treatment_timeline.event: Diagnosis of amniotic band at the fetus’s ankle and toes involving a left thick edematous foot and a right edematous club foot.
Fetoscopic lysis of the constrictive bands performed.
Ultrasound examination showed reduced limb edema, documented distal blood flow, and active movements from both ankles and feet.
Postnatal surgery performed consisting of the release of the left Achilles tendon and the right toes.
Infant was able to walk with normal lower extremity function.

patient_outcome.recovery_timeline: 18 months to achieve normal lower extremity function.
